message:
test(proptest): add 33 property tests for swarm_work_queue coverage gaps

Expand proptest_swarm_work_queue from 18 to 51 tests (SQ-19 through SQ-51).

New coverage: WorkItem/WorkItemStatus/Assignment/CompletionRecord/WorkQueueConfig/
QueueStats/QueueSnapshot serde roundtrips, is_terminal() for all 6 variants,
WorkQueueError Display for all 7 variants, cancel (Ready and InProgress),
heartbeat (valid + wrong agent), agent capacity enforcement, fail with retry
exhaustion, BeadRecord serde + is_actionable/is_terminal properties,
BeadsSyncReport serde, BeadsImportError serde + Display, sequence monotonicity,
completion_log growth, ready_items/agent_items scoping, complete from wrong
agent, pull on empty queue.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
